SEARCH
Package model.user

Class Manager

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
model.user.Employee
model.user.Manager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable, Reportable
public class Manager extends Employee implements Reportable
University manager role for academic operations.

Managers create courses, approve registration requests, assign teachers, manage news, inspect students and teachers, and generate academic reports.

See Also:

    • Manager

      public Manager(String name, String surname, String birthDate, String phoneNumber, String email, String password, Managers managerType)

  • Method Details

    • createCourse

      public void createCourse(String name, int credits, String courseId)
      Creates a basic major course if the course identifier is not already used.
      Parameters:
      name - course name
      credits - credit count
      courseId - unique course identifier

    • createCourse

      public void createCourse(String name, int credits, String courseId, CourseType type, String school, int year)
      Creates a course with registration metadata.
      Parameters:
      name - course name
      credits - credit count
      courseId - unique course identifier
      type - course category
      school - school offering the course
      year - target year of study

    • assignCourseToTeachers

      public void assignCourseToTeachers(String courseId, String teacherName)
      Assigns a teacher login/name to a course instructor list.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course identifier
      teacherName - teacher value stored for the assignment

    • viewRequests

      public String viewRequests()

    • approveRegistration

      public String approveRegistration(String studentId, String courseId, String approve)
      Approves or rejects a pending student course registration.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student identifier
      courseId - course identifier
      approve - expected value ACCEPT to approve, anything else rejects
      Returns:
      result message for the manager menu

      public void addNews(String id, String topic, String title, String text)
      Adds a news item and re-sorts news so research items remain pinned.

      id - news identifier
      topic - news topic
      title - news title
      text - news body
